Localization.Description: The certificate had been issued to the user before the user existed in Active Directory, and no strong mapping could be found. This event is logged only when the KDC is in the Compatibility mode.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Key Distribution Center (KDC) detected a valid certificate of the user {subject.account.name} that could not be strongly mapped to the user (for example, via explicit mapping, key trust mapping, or a SID) on host {event_src.host}. The certificate also predated the user it mapped to, so it was rejected.
